working_on.task: Completed all 4 phases of Readability4J integration and validation.
working_on.notes: Added smart content extraction for unknown sites. Optimized ProGuard for SLF4J.

pending_tasks.notes: Check if gemma-3-1b-it is truly sufficient for all content

recent_changes.description: Phase 4: Validated R8/ProGuard release build successfully after adding dontwarn rules for SLF4J.
Phase 3: Integrated ReadabilityExtractor into ContentExtractorRegistry pipeline between site-specific and generic fallbacks.
Phase 2: Created ReadabilityExtractor wrapper with Vietnamese encoding support and navigation-heavy detection.
Phase 1: Added readability4j 1.0.8 dependency and version catalog entries.

errors_encountered.error: R8 Build failed due to missing org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder
Unit tests failing due to short content length
errors_encountered.solution: Increased test HTML length to > 500 characters to pass ReadabilityExtractor thresholds.

decisions_made.decision: Priority order: Custom > Site-Specific > Readability > Generic
decisions_made.reason: Ensures accuracy for known sites while providing smart extraction for unknown ones.
Readability4J uses it for logging which is not essential for core functionality on Android.
